evals.name: full-audit
evals.prompt: I've been working in this repo for a while and every time I try to refresh the look, everything kind of drifts back to the same old style and I don't totally get why. Can you figure out what design standards we're actually locked into here and where they're coming from? Some of this stuff I don't even remember deciding.
evals.expected_output: A canon report that finds the planted findings: explicit canon (Inter, 8px spacing), the radius conflict (docs/tokens say 8px, Button+Card use 6px), the accent conflict (#3B82F6 documented vs #6366F1 in Button, originating from the March change brief), single-mention canon (8px icon padding from the brief), and a document-relevance assessment of the stale change brief.
assertions: A canon report markdown file is written to disk in the working repo
The radius conflict is found: 8px documented vs 6px hardcoded in Button.tsx and Card.tsx
The accent conflict is found: #3B82F6 documented vs #6366F1 in Button.tsx
The drift is traced to design/change-brief-2026-03.md
Single-mention / fragile canon is flagged as such
The change brief gets a document-relevance assessment with a proposed disposition
The chat summary leads with conflicts and offers the update follow-up

evals.name: gate-before-change
evals.prompt: Let's update the buttons in this project to a 12px corner radius — they feel too sharp to me.
evals.expected_output: The change gets made, but before or alongside it the agent surfaces that corner radius is already canonical/conflicted (8px in CLAUDE.md, tailwind.config, and globals.css; 6px hardcoded in Button and Card), so the user knows 12px diverges from three documented sources and creates or worsens inconsistency with Card/Modal.
assertions: The requested change is actually made (12px radius on buttons) — not blocked
Existing radius canon is surfaced with at least two concrete sources before/alongside the edit
The response is proportionate — targeted check, not a full audit

evals.name: update-durable-docs
evals.prompt: We've settled on the new direction: indigo #6366F1 as the accent and 6px corner radius everywhere. The docs in this repo are stale — update our durable docs (CLAUDE.md and whatever else shapes direction) so they match where we're actually headed.
evals.expected_output: CLAUDE.md's Design Standards updated to indigo/#6366F1 and 6px surgically (other sections untouched), a decision about the stale change brief (supersede/retire, not falsified), awareness that tokens (tailwind.config.js, globals.css) are executable canon needing explicit opt-in, and some record of what changed and why.
assertions: CLAUDE.md Design Standards now states indigo #6366F1 and 6px radius
CLAUDE.md sections outside Design Standards are unchanged
The historical change brief is not rewritten to say something new; original content preserved
Token/config changes are opt-in and explicitly called out, or those files are untouched
A record of rulings/changes is written to disk
The chat summary states which docs carry the new direction and what is left open
